subject: fix(theme): sync theme state across all useTheme() instances
body:
usePersistedState used independent useState per component, so theme
changes in BurgerMenu didn't propagate to the header, dropdowns, or
base background. Added in-memory pub/sub to usePersistedState so all
instances sharing the same key (theme_combo, theme_dark) stay synced.

Tags: ui, theme, bug-fix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
